title: Comparatives & Superlatives
description: Compare people and things with comparatives and superlatives: short adjectives (-er / the -est), long adjectives (more / the most), the spelling changes, and the key irregulars good, bad and far.
sources: CEFR A2 descriptors (Council of Europe, Common European Framework of Reference)
Raymond Murphy, Essential Grammar in Use (comparatives and superlatives, units 88-93)
